data_quality_statement: All sensor readings verified against uHoo device calibration records. No data gaps detected during the monitoring period.

findings.interpretation_text: CO2 levels in the lobby are well within acceptable limits, indicating adequate ventilation.
findings.workforce_impact_text: No adverse effects on cognitive function or comfort expected.

findings.interpretation_text: CO2 levels in the open office area are within acceptable limits but trending upward during peak occupancy.
findings.workforce_impact_text: Minor drowsiness possible during afternoon hours if ventilation is not adjusted.
findings.recommended_action: Monitor afternoon readings. Consider increasing HVAC fresh air intake during peak hours.

findings.interpretation_text: CO2 levels in Meeting Room A approach the upper threshold during occupied periods. This is consistent with high-density occupancy and limited air exchange.
findings.workforce_impact_text: Occupants may experience reduced concentration and mild headaches during extended meetings.
findings.recommended_action: Install CO2-triggered ventilation boost. Limit maximum occupancy to 8 persons.

top_actions.action: Install CO2-triggered ventilation boost in Meeting Room A
